item.title: The heroes are out there

item.dc:creator: onushka

item.title: Tribute to Random Stuff
item.description:
#1 Something for everyone
#2 Fully operational wooden transmission and piston engine All credits go to the incredibly talented creator over at the YouTube channel Generic Woodworking. The level of patience and engineering it takes to cut wooden gears to these exact tolerances is absolutely mind-blowing.
#3 Neat
#4 Future Hall of Famer, LeBron James, playing in little league
#5 Quick mod to Vette
#6 What's up, Doc
#7 Dad and kids day out
#8 Junior Camineiro at today's MLB Allstar game. Basically an exhibition game. Ouch
#9 Martial artist & knife fighting instructor Doug Marcaida shows how lethal a 'karambit' could be in the hands of an expert
#10 What is pup thinking?
#11 Had to add something banana related
#12 Monster truck does front flip at competition
#13 Room filled with flammable gas ignited.
#14 Been there, done that
#15 Classic Italian fair ride called Calcinculo, which I believe means kick in the ass. You actually team up with the person in the seat in front of you. As the ride spins, the person in the back pushes or kicks the seat of the person in front to launch them higher and further outward. The goal is for the person in front to reach up and snatch a prize, usually a fluffy tail or ribbon, dangling from a pole held by the operator.
#16 Dutch aerobatic pilot Narine Melkumjan survived after her aircraft's canopy unexpectedly burst open and shattered mid-flight
item.dc:creator: UnattendedDeviant

item.title: ICE blames Trump for quota-backed shooting spree
item.description: "They are being forced to have quotas again. They are being pushed for numbers and quotas. There is a demand for 2,000 arrests a day. Leaders are being fired for bad numbers. They are canceling leave. Stretching the field thin. Pushing them to the extremes. It’s a very bad, toxic environment. Morale is horrible. Eighty percent of the office has to be in the field. Made them work on July 4th. It’s not sustainable. And it’s not safe. It’s bad." https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/us/ar-AA27T07g
item.dc:creator: mcoulter876

item.title: If only
item.description: If this sounds good to you, you might be a socialist. Ai and robotics under capitalism will be truly devastating to the working class. Under socialism, it would mean you’d get paid more for less work.
item.dc:creator: Mgxr44

item.title: Follow the money
item.description: Entire industries depend on you not working from home: gas stations, car dealers, car loan places, car insurance, car repair, daycare, the soda machines that charge you $2.50 for a mfing can of soda at work, all the fast food places, uber/lyft, and lets not forget the big obvious ones: commercial real estate. Since the same funds that invested in "company that provides some alleged service" are also invested into "company that provides office space", that's where the push to RTO comes from.
item.dc:creator: PileOfWalthers

item.dc:creator: DOcelot1

item.title: Girls just want a sword :)
item.description: A sword was stolen from the famous "Shermer" sculpture in Wrocław. A 24-year-old woman was detained on the spot. In Wrocław, one of the symbols of the city, the "Shermer" fountain (Fontanna "Szermierz") on University Square (Plac Uniwersytecki) near the University of Wrocław (Uniwersytet Wrocławski), was once again damaged. On Saturday, at around 3:30 a.m., employees of the Wrocław City Guard (Straż Miejska Wrocławia) detained a 24-year-old woman who was dismantling the sword from the sculpture.
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: Good idea
item.dc:creator: MilvaBarring

item.title: GovBrief Today #530
item.description: Senate Democrats just refused to pay for Trump's war. Congress has passed a defense bill every year since 1961. The streak survived Vietnam, both wars in Iraq, and every shutdown fight since. On Tuesday the Senate blocked this year's bill rather than hand over $1.15 trillion for a war Congress never authorized. Four senators missed the vote, and the bill fails even if all four show up and vote for it. The war they wouldn't fund changes shape by the day. Trump announced a 20% toll on cargo passing through the Strait of Hormuz on Monday, then killed his plan Tuesday after Gulf leaders called to object. Now he promises that next week gets "really bad," with strikes on Iran's bridges and power plants if Tehran doesn't cut a deal. I've emailed 8,232 stories over 530 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260714-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-july14 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/cyclospora-lettuce [3] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-election-speech [4] https://go.govbrief.today/musk-wisconsin [5] https://go.govbrief.today/ny-data-center [6] https://go.govbrief.today/dc-guard-extension [7] https://go.govbrief.today/iraq-withdrawal [8] https://go.govbrief.today/subpoenas-epshteyn [9] https://go.govbrief.today/carroll-settlement [10] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-traffic-stops [11] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-pedestrian [12] https://go.govbrief.today/darline-graham [13] https://go.govbrief.today/house-dst [14] https://go.govbrief.today/ndaa-democrats [15] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-graham-fbi [16] https://go.govbrief.today/doge-housing [17] https://go.govbrief.today/korean-payoff [18] https://go.govbrief.today/danville-imagine [19] https://go.govbrief.today/maine-protest-day2 Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Inside you there are two Greeks
item.dc:creator: skapanda616

item.title: Dear Technoligarchs,
item.description: We can not stop AI. Nothing will put the genie back in the bottle. This WILL happen. But we absolutely can use our power to demand responsibility, justice, and transparency. (Edit: I hope you will accept my typos as proof I'm hooman. )
item.dc:creator: Niixiie

item.title: I will most likely delete this but here are my paintings and me
item.description: As you can see, I don't look my best right now. It is pretty hot where I live, and I am in the middle of moving all of my things across an ocean. As you can see, I don't really match my artwork at all. I am going to be completely honest, sometimes I get self conscious about it because I don't really look how umm....people think I would :D As I said, I will most likely delete this pretty soon, but... I was looking at all my things in the corner and thought might as well with pose them before I ship them off.
item.dc:creator: tornwallpaperboi

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1748 (living in margaritaville)
item.description:
Let's get this bread
Western Bluebird
Pride flag made from shelled creatures
Mexíca turquoise and wood mask, c. 1500
Remember, Lewis was actually married to one of the leading British feminists of his day.
Western Tanager
Hell yes.
Hell yes.
Wizards, in my case
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Peekaboo! [Existential conure screaming]" ____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Robert Reich: "Any serious candidate for office must be willing to curb ICE's power while Trump is president. Immigration agents inflicting brutality across the country must be held accountable. And ultimately, we must abolish ICE.
item.description: "The little girl was still in Bluey pajamas. No older than 3, she was trying to smell the flowers. At her side, a pink rolling bag." "Her father... had just been fatally shot and yanked from a car he'd been driving. Now, he lay handcuffed in the street, where he would remain for five hours." – Reuben M. Schafir, Portland Press Herald, July 14, 2026
item.dc:creator: OceansRust
